name: github_add_org_copilot_space_collaborator
description: Add a collaborator to an organization Copilot Space (POST /orgs/{org}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/collaborators). Requires actor_type (User|Team), actor_identifier, and role (reader|writer|admin). Returns HTTP 201. See [Add a collaborator to an organization Copilot Space](https://docs.github.com/e
